description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist rectangular design and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete or stucco, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The front features a covered carport with two vehicles parked side by side, and a small landscaped area with trees and tiled pavement. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of narrow vertical and horizontal panes, and there is a balcony on one side. The rear and side facades are mostly solid, with limited window openings, emphasizing privacy. The house is surrounded by a paved area and sparse landscaping, including palm trees and a deciduous tree.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and asymmetrical windows, featuring a covered carport and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entryway, and a mix of windows and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid gray wall with minimal windows and a single tree for landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a balcony, additional entry, and more tiled pavement with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with several windows, a visible car in the carport, and two palm trees in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under a carport, with a flat overhang and minimal decorative elements.
